prompt: A dramatic ultra-realistic motorsport action photograph of a modern Formula 1 race car in {argument name="team livery" default="dark navy with red and yellow accents"} charging through heavy rain on a soaked circuit, shot from a very low trackside angle near the front-left corner of the car. The car dominates the foreground, with slick aerodynamic bodywork, exposed wet tires throwing up massive sprays of water, glowing red reflections on the wet asphalt, and sharp sponsor-style markings across the nose, front wing, sidepod, and rear wing. Capture the sensation of high speed with subtle motion blur in the background and water streaks, while keeping the car body mostly crisp and detailed. The scene takes place in a packed stadium-like racetrack with 1 main grandstand full of blurred spectators along the left side, 2 bright red illuminated signage boards in the distance, 1 safety fence running parallel to the track, and 1 reflective rain-soaked racing surface stretching toward the camera. Overhead, dense storm clouds fill the sky, creating a moody cinematic atmosphere with cold blue-gray tones contrasted by the car’s vivid warm colors. Emphasize dramatic spray, reflections, realism, tension, and the feeling of a championship race in brutal weather, as if captured on a professional sports telephoto-lens camera with shallow depth of field, high contrast, and editorial motorsport photography styling.
translatedPrompt: 一张极具张力的超写实赛车动作摄影作品，展示了一辆现代 F1 赛车（{argument name="team livery" default="深蓝色配红黄点缀"}）在暴雨中冲过湿滑赛道的场景，采用极低视角从赛道旁靠近赛车左前角的位置拍摄。赛车占据前景，展现出光滑的空气动力学车身、飞溅起大量水雾的湿地轮胎、湿润沥青路面上红色的发光倒影，以及车鼻、前翼、侧箱和尾翼上清晰的赞助商标识。通过背景和水痕的细微动态模糊捕捉高速感，同时保持车身主体清晰且细节丰富。场景设定在一个类似体育场的拥挤赛道中，左侧是坐满模糊观众的 1 个主看台，远处有 2 个明亮的红色发光项目，1 道与赛道平行的安全护栏，以及 1 条向镜头延伸的、倒映着雨景的湿滑赛道表面。头顶上方，浓密的风暴云层布满天空，营造出冷蓝灰色调与赛车鲜艳暖色调形成对比的电影感氛围。强调戏剧性的水雾、倒影、真实感、紧张氛围以及在恶劣天气下进行冠军赛的临场感，如同使用专业体育长焦镜头、浅景深、高对比度及编辑类赛车摄影风格拍摄而成。

breakdown.creativeCore: 雨中方程式赛车疾驰：此提示词可生成一张电影级、超写实的 F1 风格赛车照片，非常适合用于体育海报、编辑视觉素材及极具张力的赛车内容。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: high contrast, shallow depth, depth of field, lens, camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
